sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Tracking = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('onprogress'); const [trucks, setTrucks] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch(`http://localhost:5000/api/trucks?status=${activeTab}`) .then((res) => res.json()) .then((data) => setTrucks(data)) .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch trucks:", err)); }, [activeTab]); // Akan dipanggil setiap kali tab berganti return (
{/* Sidebar */}

Admin

Master Data
Tracking
Info Driver
Settings
Logout
{/* Main Content */}

Dashboard

Tracking

{/* Truck Cards */}
{trucks.length === 0 ? (

Tidak ada truk dengan status "{activeTab}"

) : ( trucks.map(truck => (

Truck {truck.id}

Lokasi saat ini: {truck.gate}

Waktu Scan: {truck.timestamp}

{truck.note}

)) )}
); }; export default Tracking;
